subsystems.summary: Wave 1 native menu ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Wave 1 native message/text ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Battle has native runtime ownership, editor inspection/preview surfaces, schema and migration contracts, diagnostics, runtime VFX baseline, and closure signoff approved for the claimed Wave 1 scope.

Save/data runtime, recovery, migration, inspection, policy editing, RPG Maker MV/MZ binary save loading, and end-to-end compat save import into native runtime-owned state are landed and closure signoff is approved for the claimed Wave 1 scope.

Compat bridge exit is closed for the bounded import, validation, migration, diagnostics, and verification scope. Public compat registries under runtimes/compat_js now have no PARTIAL method-status markers, failure and successful live QuickJS plugin execution diagnostics/export parity are covered, and the closure signoff is approved for the claimed bridge-exit scope.

Presentation runtime, bridge, compiled spatial editor panels, end-to-end authoring-to-runtime proof path, release validation harness, bounded real renderer-backed production-path proof, shell-owned MapScene/MenuScene plus BattleScene actor-cue proof through the top-level EngineShell loop, a first non-OpenGL HeadlessRenderer shell-owned MapScene command-consumption proof, a registered standalone profile_arena target, concrete ProfileArenaHotReloader with arena-reset lifecycle, presentation schema + migration proof fixture, and command-stream replay + reload determinism tests are landed. Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: A first non-OpenGL HeadlessRenderer command-consumption proof is landed; full cross-backend renderer breadth remains future work under visual_regression_harness
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Gameplay ability runtime, inspector/editor surfaces, structured diagnostics snapshot, end-to-end release-grade test, closure signoff artifact, gameplay_ability JSON schema (S24-T01), compat-to-native MZ mapper with deterministic fallback payloads (S24-T02), live BattleScene activation, AbilityBattleQueue integration into BattleFlowController (S24-T03/T04), deterministic AbilityTask WaitInput/WaitEvent/WaitProjectileCollision backends, and authored battle/map ability orchestration with editor preview are landed. Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: One authored battle/map ability orchestration asset path is landed with runtime activation, target pattern diagnostics, editor preview, saved JSON, and tests; broader task-driven composition remains product-depth backlog
Scripted conditions (activeCondition/passiveCondition strings) intentionally not evaluated
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Governance foundation has first-slice artifacts landed: breaking-change detection, enhanced readiness checks, template specs, bidirectional readiness/truth drift detection, canonical project schema governance sections for localization/input/exportProfiles, project-audit shape checks for that vocabulary, artifact checks for input, localization-bundle, accessibility, audio, character, mod, analytics, and performance, a bounded controller-binding runtime/panel plus input governance script/fixture contract, a canonical release-signoff workflow artifact, truth reconciliation wired into the full PR gate pipeline (S25-T02), template-spec-bar drift detection (S25-T04 check_template_spec_bar_drift.ps1), governance gate regression tests (S25-T05/T06/T07), and a ProjectAudit CLI-to-DiagnosticsWorkspace parity contract with mismatch diagnostics.
mainGaps: Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Character identity runtime, editor creator panel, character creation rules, bounded validation runtime, ECS component/system integration, deterministic spawner, preset-based runtime creator screen, preview card surface, runtime-created protagonist save/load persistence, and layered portrait/field/battle composition are landed with schema and focused tests.
mainGaps: Character identity validator, governance script, ProjectAudit artifact section, bounded runtime creator screen, preview card surface, and reusable CharacterCreationRules runtime are landed for the current editor/runtime contract.

Creation rules now enforce background/origin/species restrictions, free-text naming limits, class appearance restrictions, and stat allocation budgets; runtime-created protagonist save/load persistence is landed with editor save diagnostics and schema proof.
Layered portrait/field/battle composition is landed through CharacterAppearanceComposition with editor preview snapshots, schema, fixture, and focused tests.

subsystems.summary: Achievement registry with progress tracking, unlock conditions, trigger parsing, event-bus auto-unlock, editor panel, vendor-neutral trophy export payload, platform backend synchronization, and packaged platform profile application are landed.
mainGaps: Achievement validator is landed with EmptyId, EmptyTitle, EmptyUnlockCondition, ZeroTarget, DuplicateId, and EmptyIconId checks.
Vendor-neutral trophy export payload is landed with runtime JSON, editor summary, schema, fixture, governance, and focused tests.

Platform backend synchronization is landed through IAchievementPlatformBackend with in-tree memory and command backends plus AchievementPlatformProfile packaged configuration; proprietary store SDK credentials remain project configuration, not mocked in engine code.

subsystems.summary: Accessibility auditor with missing-label, focus-order, contrast, navigation rules, live editor adapters, and renderer-derived WYSIWYG contrast ingestion is landed.
mainGaps: All four bounded adapter surfaces (menu, spatial, audio, battle) are now covered.
Renderer-derived WYSIWYG contrast ingestion is landed through render_contrast_adapter over FrameRenderCommand text/rect surfaces; broader contrast coverage across every UI surface remains backlog.
Automated CI enforcement of accessibility report artifacts is validated by check_accessibility_governance.ps1.

subsystems.summary: Visual regression harness with golden file management, diff heatmaps, approval tooling, a file-backed executable harness gate, backend-selectable capture entry points, and one bounded OpenGL-enabled local renderer-backed capture lane enforcing primitive, live-widget, full-frame scene, transition-pair, diff-heatmap, shell-owned full-scene Map/Menu goldens, and a shell-owned BattleScene actor-cue crop golden in local gates and Gate 1 CI is landed.
mainGaps: Broader backend execution â€” deferred; the generic capture API currently routes only to the bounded OpenGL-backed implementation and explicit headless rejection rather than cross-backend parity.
Wider shell-owned state/permutation coverage â€” deferred; current goldens now prove bounded EngineShell MapScene, MenuScene, and BattleScene slices rather than every production render path.

subsystems.summary: Audio mix preset bank with default profiles, category volume mapping, ducking rules, editor panel, validator governance, and live AudioCore backend smoke diagnostics is landed.
mainGaps: Audio mix preset validator is landed with MissingDefaultPreset, ConflictingDuckRules, VolumeOutOfRange, EmptyCategoryVolumes, unknown-category, and cross-preset duck-conflict checks.
A bounded live AudioCore backend smoke path is landed for preset application diagnostics; broad physical device/backend matrix coverage remains backlog.

subsystems.summary: Platform-specific export validator with per-target requirement checking, fixture-backed validation coverage, PowerShell CI script with JSON output, canonical urpg_pack_cli entrypoint, diagnostics panel with post-export artifact surfacing, bounded real Windows/Web/Linux/macOS bootstrap paths, bundle-level lightweight RLE-plus-XOR payload protection plus keyed integrity-tag validation, configured project-asset auto-discovery manifest staging, bounded repo-owned content bundling for readiness/schema/level-library roots, governed manifest-driven promoted-asset bundle staging support, keyed SHA-256 bundle-signature validation, runtime/load-time bundle rejection, temp-file-plus-atomic-rename publication, and structured bundle-summary JSON reporting are landed.
mainGaps: Configured project-asset root discovery is landed; broader arbitrary external intake/store discovery remains future work.
Full native packaging/signing/notarization is still out of scope.

Runtime/load-time signature enforcement is landed through RuntimeBundleLoader and RuntimeStartupServices, with tamper tests covering payload, manifest, missing signature, unsupported signature mode, and startup rejection; export remains PARTIAL because native signing/notarization and broader platform packaging are still out of scope.

subsystems.summary: Mod registry with manifest registration, dependency resolution, load-order topology, bounded validation runtime, sandboxed QuickJS activation, deterministic reload, polling hot-load, editor manager panel hot-load event log, and local mod-store catalog install are landed.
mainGaps: Mod registry validator, governance script, and ProjectAudit artifact section are landed for the bounded manifest/editor contract.
Live mod loading is landed through ModLoader activation, deterministic reload/unload, ModHotLoader entrypoint polling, and ModManagerPanel event-log actions/snapshots.
Sandboxed script execution is landed through QuickJS mod contexts with deny-by-default policy checks and runtime command registration.

Local mod-store catalog integration is landed through ModStoreCatalog, ModStoreInstaller, schema/fixture evidence, and ModManagerPanel install actions; external marketplace credentials, payments, reviews, and proprietary platform SDK publishing remain project configuration.

subsystems.summary: Opt-in analytics dispatcher with deterministic tick counters, event buffering, circular drop, local and remote telemetry upload, reviewed endpoint profiles, editor panel, and bounded validator/governance coverage is landed.
mainGaps: Analytics validator, governance script, and ProjectAudit artifact section are landed for the bounded opt-in telemetry/editor contract.

Telemetry upload pipeline is landed with local JSONL export, custom handler mode, configured HTTP JSON endpoint upload via command transport, and AnalyticsEndpointProfile privacy-review gates surfaced through AnalyticsPanel.
Session aggregation is landed in AnalyticsUploader through cross-session event/category counters.
A bounded endpoint-profile privacy review evidence contract is landed; qualified production privacy/legal review remains mandatory before public release.

barEvidence.accessibility: Baseline accessibility governance (label checks, focus-order audits, contrast rules) is exercised via AccessibilityAuditor unit tests and the accessibility panel adapter. JRPG-specific text-speed control and input-hold alternatives are scaffolded; production enforcement not yet landed.
barEvidence.audio: Audio mix preset governance and validator rules are exercised via test_audio_mix_presets. JRPG-specific battle jingle and BGM-transition bars are scaffolded in AudioMixPresets but not fully validated end-to-end.
barEvidence.input: Menu and battle input paths are covered by test_input_core and test_input_manager. Controller-binding governance and cross-template remap validation are tested via test_input_remap_store. Full closure requires end-to-end remap regression for all menu/battle screens.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message and menu localization patterns are exercised via message_text_core tests. Completeness metrics, font-set coverage, and per-region test fixtures are not yet landed.
barEvidence.performance: General RPG frame-time budgets are enforced through presentation_runtime arena allocation and profile_arena tests. Large-world streaming and extended-play battle-sequence consistency are not production-validated.

templates.safeScope: Wave 1 native-first baseline with truthful residual gaps.
mainBlockers: Cross-cutting readiness bars are not complete; bar evidence is documented but production-grade closure is pending for each bar

barEvidence.accessibility: Baseline accessibility audits (label, contrast, focus) cover dialogue and menu UI elements through AccessibilityAuditor. Visual-novel-specific pacing controls (text auto-advance toggle, read-speed override) are scaffolded but not production-enforced.
barEvidence.audio: Audio mix preset governance is active. Visual-novel-specific ambient BGM layer management and voice-over duck rules are scaffolded; end-to-end validation is not yet landed.
barEvidence.input: Dialogue-advance and menu-navigation input paths are covered by test_input_core. Accessibility-input alternatives (auto-advance, skip) are scaffolded but not yet fully governed.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message localization patterns from message_text_core tests apply. Visual-novel-specific multi-voice character name insertion and per-language font-set coverage are not yet measured.
barEvidence.performance: Presentation runtime and profile_arena tests provide frame-time budget coverage. Sustained dialogue-heavy session load and asset streaming are not production-validated.

templates.safeScope: Dialogue-heavy projects within current native message and save scope.
mainBlockers: Template-grade governance is not complete; bar evidence is documented but production-grade closure is pending for each bar

barEvidence.accessibility: Baseline accessibility governance (label audits, focus-order, contrast) is active. Turn-based-RPG-specific accessibility expectations (battle-menu hold alternatives, status-screen readability) are scaffolded but not fully enforced.
barEvidence.audio: Audio mix preset governance applies. Turn-based-RPG-specific battle audio transitions and victory fanfare sequencing are scaffolded in AudioMixPresets but not fully validated.
barEvidence.input: Battle and menu input paths are covered. Controller remap and cross-template binding governance via test_input_remap_store apply. Full binding closure for all battle actions is pending.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message localization patterns from message_text_core apply. Per-template completeness metrics and font-set coverage are not yet measured.
barEvidence.performance: Presentation runtime arena and profile_arena frame-time budget tests apply. Battle-sequence scalability under extended play is not production-validated.

templates.safeScope: A conservative turn-based template slice similar to jrpg without implying broader productization.
mainBlockers: Cross-cutting readiness bars and dedicated template governance remain incomplete; bar evidence is documented but production-grade closure is pending for each bar

barEvidence.accessibility: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines tactics_grid_labels, unit roster/grid/action-menu labels, and grid contrast mode.
barEvidence.audio: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines unit_select, move_confirm, attack_preview, and turn_start tactics cues.
barEvidence.input: TemplateRuntimeProfile and generated starter project define tactical_battle_loop and scenario_authoring_loop with grid/action commands.
barEvidence.localization: TemplateRuntimeProfile requires scenario.title, objective.primary, action.move, and action.attack keys.
barEvidence.performance: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines turn_budget_16ms and bounded 12x10 scenario grid starter data.

templates.safeScope: Grid tactics starter projects with scenario authoring, deployment zones, deterministic turn-order, cross-cutting bars, and save loop.

barEvidence.accessibility: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines health_bar, stamina_bar, quick_slot, and target_lock labels.
barEvidence.audio: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines swing, dodge, hit-confirm, and low-health cues.
barEvidence.input: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines light_attack, heavy_attack, dodge, interact, and quick_item actions.
barEvidence.localization: TemplateRuntimeProfile requires combat.dodge, combat.quick_item, and prompt.interact keys.
barEvidence.performance: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines frame_budget_16ms for real-time combat starter projects.

templates.safeScope: Action RPG starter projects with real-time combat states, stamina/dodge/attack actions, closure visibility cues, growth loop, and save loop.

barEvidence.accessibility: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines creature_roster, capture_button, party_slot, and ability_grid labels.
barEvidence.audio: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines encounter_start, capture_throw, capture_success, and capture_breakout cues.
barEvidence.input: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines capture_loop and party_assembly_loop starter flow.
barEvidence.localization: TemplateRuntimeProfile requires creature.name, capture.success, capture.failed, and party.swap keys.
barEvidence.performance: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines encounter_budget and bounded starter species/party data.

templates.safeScope: Monster collector starter projects with species definitions, capture formula, party assembly, battle loop, and save loop.

barEvidence.accessibility: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines calendar, relationship_log, recipe_list, and vendor_stock labels.
barEvidence.audio: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines day_start, craft_complete, friendship_up, and shop_open cues.
barEvidence.input: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines daily_life_loop, relationship_loop, crafting_loop, and economy_loop.
barEvidence.localization: TemplateRuntimeProfile requires day.morning, activity.craft, relationship.gift, and shop.buy keys.
barEvidence.performance: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines day_tick_budget with bounded schedule/social starter data.

templates.safeScope: Cozy life starter projects with day phases, NPC routines, relationships, crafting, economy, vendors, and save loop.

barEvidence.accessibility: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines map_region, ability_gate, checkpoint, and upgrade_pickup labels.
barEvidence.audio: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines ability_unlock, gate_open, checkpoint, and low_health cues.
barEvidence.input: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines traversal_loop, ability_gate_loop, and map_unlock_loop.
barEvidence.localization: TemplateRuntimeProfile requires ability.dash, ability.wall_jump, region.locked, and map.checkpoint keys.
barEvidence.performance: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines room_budget with bounded region/gate data.

templates.safeScope: Metroidvania-lite starter projects with dash/wall-jump/double-jump traversal gates, region unlock data, map loop, and save loop.

barEvidence.accessibility: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines depth_cue, navigation_prompt, interact_target, and minimap labels.
barEvidence.audio: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines footstep_near, door_open, spatial_ambience, and interact_prompt cues.
barEvidence.localization: TemplateRuntimeProfile requires area.name, prompt.forward, prompt.turn, and prompt.interact keys.
barEvidence.performance: TemplateRuntimeProfile defines raycast_budget and 640x480/fov starter config.

templates.safeScope: 2.5D RPG starter projects with raycast authoring adapter, blocking-cell validation, spatial navigation, export validation contract, and save loop.
